info.name: AI CV Builder API
info.description:
Postman collection for AI CV Builder (Ollama Qwen).

Base URL default: http://127.0.0.1:8001

Workflow:
1. Health Check
2. Create CV → cv_id auto-saved
3. Use AI endpoints or update CV
4. Export PDF/DOCX

request.description: Check API status and Ollama Qwen model availability.
Get all CV templates (professional, modern, executive, minimal, fresh_graduate).
List all saved CVs.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "My Professional CV",
  "template_id": "professional",
  "tone": "professional",
  "content": {
    "full_name": "Ali Khan",
    "job_title": "Software Engineer",
    "contact": {
      "email": "ali@example.com",
      "phone": "+92 300 1234567",
      "location": "Lahore, Pakistan",
      "linkedin": "linkedin.com/in/alikhan",
      "website": "",
      "github": "github.com/alikhan"
    },
    "summary": "Software engineer with 5+ years experience in Python and React.",
    "experience": [
      {
        "company": "Tech Corp",
        "role": "Senior Developer",
        "location": "Lahore",
        "start_date": "2021-01",
        "end_date": "",
        "current": true,
        "bullets": [
          "Built REST APIs with FastAPI serving 10k+ daily users",
          "Led migration to microservices architecture"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "education": [
      {
        "institution": "University of Punjab",
        "degree": "BS",
        "field": "Computer Science",
        "start_date": "2015",
        "end_date": "2019",
        "gpa": "3.6",
        "highlights": []
      }
    ],
    "projects": [],
    "skills": ["Python", "FastAPI", "React", "PostgreSQL", "Docker"],
    "certifications": [],
    "languages": ["English", "Urdu"],
    "awards": []
  }
}

request.description: Create a new CV. Response cv.id is auto-saved to {{cv_id}}.
Get full CV document by ID.

request.description: Update CV. Set save_version=true to create a version snapshot.
Rename an existing CV.
Duplicate CV. New cv_id is auto-saved.
List version history. Latest version_id auto-saved.
Restore CV to a previous version.
Permanently delete a CV.
Download CV as PDF. Requires: pip install reportlab
Download CV as DOCX. Requires: pip install python-docx
Generate complete CV JSON from raw background text using Qwen.

request.description: Regenerate one section. Valid sections: summary, experience, education, projects, skills, certifications, languages, awards.
Improve weak wording with action verbs and professional language.
